argv: A vintage cream-enamel tilt-head stand mixer alone on a polished white marble countertop in a sunlit modern farmhouse kitchen at dawn. Glossy curved enamel body, chrome trim, smooth blank body with no text or badge. Warm golden raking light from a window left frame. Steam drifting from out of frame. Camera: very slow dolly-in on the mixer, anamorphic, shallow depth of field. Composition: subject centered lower-third, generous negative space above. Atmosphere: hushed, intimate, suspended. Tech: 35mm film grain, cinematic A24 color grade, dust motes in light beam, 9:16 vertical.
text on mixer body, brand badge, brand logo, lettering, watermark, distortion, cartoon, low quality, extra hands, plastic look

Extreme close-up macro shot inside a polished stainless-steel mixing bowl. A chrome whisk attachment turns slowly, folding glossy white meringue into soft peaks. A single amber drop of vanilla extract falls from above and lands in the cream, rippling outward. Warm window light from above-right, very shallow depth of field, anamorphic lens. Cinematic A24 grade, 35mm grain, subtle steam. 9:16 vertical, the whisk centered. Slow rotational camera move that follows the whisk's arc. Hushed, intimate.
text, watermark, logo, branding, distortion, cartoon, low quality, plastic look, fingers, hands

Wide vertical shot of a quiet modern farmhouse kitchen at golden hour. A cream-enamel tilt-head stand mixer sits at rest on a marble counter, smooth blank body with no text or badge. Beside it: a fresh artisan sourdough loaf cooling on a wooden board, a folded linen cloth, a small ceramic bowl. Flour dust hangs suspended in a thick golden beam of late-afternoon sun coming through a tall window left frame. Composition: mixer in left third, bread in right third, generous negative space above for headline. Camera: very slow, almost imperceptible push-in. Anamorphic lens, shallow DoF, 35mm film grain, A24 cinematic color, warm shadow tones. Lived-in. Heirloom.
text on mixer, brand badge, brand logo, lettering on appliance, watermark, distortion, people, hands, cartoon, low quality, plastic look

Solo upright piano, slow tempo around 60 BPM, a single suspended chord blooming and resolving across twelve seconds. Hushed, intimate, warm room tone. Soft sustain pedal. Cinematic minimalist score, A24 sensibility. No drums, no strings, no synths — solo piano only. Ends on a resolved major chord with gentle fade.
